title: How do I change my account URL?
excerpt:
As long as the URL is not being used by another user you can change your account URL as an admin! 
How to change my URL and account’s name?

posts.author: lrosalanko (Lauren Rosalanko)
posts.cookedHtml:
As long as the URL is not being used by another user you can change your account URL as an admin!
How to change my URL and account’s name?

posts.author: HPETRIE (Hannah Petrie)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello! @lrosalanko , I know that Monday.com sends an email to all users if the URL is updated. Does Monday.com also notify users if an account name is updated?

posts.author: HPETRIE (Hannah Petrie)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @pankitd - Any idea who might be able to answer this? It will impact our consolidation project

posts.author: pankitd (Pankit Doshi)
posts.cookedHtml: Answering here for the community Changing your URL will alert users about the change, but changing your account name will NOT alert users. Thanks for asking!
